name: Take the Gamble
effect: Roll a D6. If you roll a 1 You lose 2 HP, If you roll a 2 you gain a random Stat Reduction, if you roll a 3 you gain a random Stat Increase, if you roll a 4 you Heal 2 HP, if you roll a 5 a random target besides yourself Heals 2 HP, and if you roll a 6 use Metronome twice and pick one result to immediately perform.
